title: Autoscribe Config
description: Committed configuration for an Autoscribe docs site. Lives at `.autoscribe/config.json` in the docs (tenant) repo and travels with the project. Holds NO secrets — the model credential is a GitHub repo secret (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for an API key, or CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN for a Claude subscription token), never stored here.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor IntelliSense.

watchedRepo.description: The code repository Autoscribe documents and watches for merged PRs, in `owner/name` form. One watched repo per docs site (1:1 for the MVP).

docsDir.description: Directory in THIS docs repo where Docusaurus markdown/MDX content lives. Autoscribe writes and edits files only under this path (plus `sidebars.ts`).

style.description: House-style hints handed to the editorial pass and the per-PR analyst so generated prose is consistent.

voice.description: Desired writing voice / tone for generated docs.

audience.description: Primary reader the docs are written for. Steers depth and vocabulary.

model.description: Claude model alias used for per-PR sync work (the common, cost-sensitive path). Sonnet is the conservative default.

initModel.description: Claude model alias used only for the one-time initial full-repo build (`autoscribe-init`), where extra capability is worth the cost.

waveSize.description: Maximum number of parallel sub-agents per wave during fan-out (e.g. the initial build's one-section-per-agent pass). Caps concurrency to keep cost and rate-limit pressure predictable. Ported from the reference pipeline's wave-based concurrency guard.

spendCeilingUSD.description: Soft spend ceiling, in USD, for a single Action run. When the runner's estimated/observed spend for a run would exceed this, it stops early and records the breach instead of continuing. Because it is the user's own Anthropic key, this is a guardrail against runaway bills. Applies only to `agent.auth: "api_key"` (metered billing); a Claude subscription token is not per-token billed, so this is ignored under `"subscription"` and the agent's own subscription rate limits apply instead.

agent.description: Which agent runtime runs in CI and how it authenticates to the model provider. Holds NO secret — the credential value is a GitHub Actions repo secret, never stored here.

runtime.description: The coding-agent CLI the workflows install and invoke to read the code and write the docs. `claude-code` (Anthropic's @anthropic-ai/claude-code) is the built-in, fully-supported runtime. Other values name a 'bring your own agent' runtime and require a matching adapter in the template's workflows; an unrecognized runtime fails the run with a clear error rather than silently mis-running.

auth.description: How the runtime authenticates. `api_key` uses the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY repo secret (metered, pay-per-token). `subscription` uses the CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN repo secret — a Claude Pro/Max subscription token from `claude setup-token` — billed against the subscription instead of the API, subject to its rate limits.
